review_title: Very helpful for tracking team and individual progress
description: I've used Koan on and off for more than a year. Their functionality and features have vastly improved since the first time I used them over a year ago. I look forward to their continued development and progress.
author: Andrew S.
pros: It makes it very easy to track our team's progress towards our quarterly goals
cons: Team engagement, but that's more on our end of the table. Perhaps a mobile app would make it easier?

review_title: Get serious about your objectives with Koan
description: Koan helped us focus around our objectives and key results like no other software has. We use this actively every week in an all hands where we walk through everyones weekly reflections and we also get an arena for immediate feedback with regards to our objectives, both within teams and on a company level. This has helped us become more focused and structured. As a team lead, giving personal feedback on reflections has been great as well.
author: Einar I.
pros: After trying quite a few different solutions out there, we landed on Koan. It is the most feature complete with regards to doing Objectives and Key Results. Its full support for teams and the ability to create high level company goals and link these together from a lower team level is just a breeze. Love the ease of linking in general. Makes it a powerful way to align an organization with multiple teams. The weekly reflection part is super useful and the ability to constantly score our progress.
cons: Not too much to say on the con side; I do however miss a native mobile solution - but that might just be me. We're a software development company and we'd also love to see how we could link our OKRs to our roadmap, and perhaps even fully integrated.

review_title: Very limited
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: You can set deadlines for tasks and give awards to employees.
cons: The free tier was very limited and the experience could be better
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Koan is a Very Useful OKR Tool
description: Koan is very easy to work with. One time I asked for help understanding advanced features and I got connected to the [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] and he was EXTREMELY helpful to me.
author: Peter P.
pros: It allows our teams to easily update "reflections" weekly in a way that helps with individual compliance. It facilitates our entire OKR process so that we are able to track and rate OKRs real time each week.
cons: Happy with the features of the software. Software updates have been very good at advancing the functionality of the service.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best OKR software
author: Dan Z.
pros: Simple to use Amazing customer support Fun GIFs at the end of weekly reflections are delightful
cons: It lacks customization if you need something out of the normal

review_title: Works well for OKRs and Weekly Status Checks
author: Shannon H.
pros: Clean interface, easy to use (attention keyboard shortcuts is much appreciated) when entering in my weekly status, love reminding me of what I entered from the previous week, a place for a gif at the very end;
cons: The navigation is probably my least favorite. I have a nav bar that includes our high level company, below that "All Teams", below that "All goals", and then my teams (of which I'm only apart of one). There is also a header with duplicate links that also navigate to several pages, but not all. Cleaning this up would improve the experience and finding things easier. Possible area for growth, our company overall has OKRs in formats that are all over the place. That is more on us to figure out, but Koan could provide tips on how to write an Objective (inspirational) vs an KR (measurable), etc.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Awesome tool for teams committed to the OKR framework
description: It has allowed us to really focus our efforts on hitting our key corporate objectives.
author: Elliott E.
pros: Really easy to post weekly updates and gather team feedback on what OKRs are at risk or on track. Weekly trend analyses are great. Team only views allow teams to focus on what is important to them.
cons: OKRs are not just software enabled. It would be interesting to see more support on what makes a good OKR. That may be the role of a consultant or integrator.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Koan helps to hone our focus as we scale
description: Customer service is great
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Customer service is great; so is bank of help articles.
cons: I don’t love the product decision to tell you you are late in submitting a weekly reflection. If they want to keep it they could make submitting a reflection easier

review_title: Perfect OKR tool for med-sized companies
description: We got strategic and tactical team alignment in just a day. Right now the concept of OKRs brings us real value. And there was no need to teach employees how to use it as it was super-intuitive.
author: Alec V.
pros: The ease of use and user flow is just marvelous. We easily implemented a tool and moved away from spreadsheets. And it has the set of functionality that covers most of our needs (even lightweight API integration)
cons: Still, we miss some customization features that are unique to our processes and cadence
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The fastest way to get started with OKRs
description: We are more structured and focused as a team.
author: Vladimir O.
pros: Its simplicity makes a lot of sense if you want your team to adopt and integrate OKRs in their daily routine. Their weekly emails and Slack notifications for reflections are amazing.
cons: Being a young problem expect little bugs. Nothing major so far.

review_title: Love your feedback :)
description: We started as one of the initial beta customers back in 2018. The product keeps growing and maturing in and the team is super responsive to feedback and ideas. Once the planning and reflection habit took hold in our business, Koan quickly became an essential part of our toolkit for creating a high performance culture.
author: Aaron W.
pros: Super lightweight way to drive momentum across the whole organization. We use Koan across the entire organiszation to track progress against quarterly goals at an individual level. Love how it keeps everyone aligned on goals and progress and signals if goals are at risk (by checking in on confidence levels each week). Also, a helpful prompt and interface to share feedback and appreciation with individuals.
cons: Could benefit by having a way to track key business metrics as well.

review_title: Seamless OKR Management
description: Integrates OKR management seamlessly into our daily activities.
author: Mark B.
pros: Leveraging Koan to manage OKRs across teams and our entire organization significantly reduced the burden and overhead of using the OKR process. It's transformed the way we engage around OKRs and report on progress week to week. Reflections are the go-to feature for capturing our team's progress and making that visible across teams and to leadership.
cons: I'd like to see more integration with other tools that we use to track project activity and tie that into our weekly reflections.

review_title: Koan helps us exceed our goals
description: Koan has helped us track data, build morale, and absolutely crush our goals. With a positive mindset, Koan can help you go farther than you thought possible.
author: Emily K.
pros: I find that Koan is very easy to use. It seems like everything they provide in the software has a purpose in helping us not only meet, but exceed our goals. I love how we can keep close tabs on our goals and keep our team in the loop. There have been a few instances where we made a goal for ourselves, which seemed out of reach, but we exceeded them. That showed us that we were capable of so much more than we thought we could as a small team.
cons: Koan has worked great for our team. We've used it for over a year now, and at this time I don't have any complaints.

review_title: Easy to use & helpful
description: It's helping increase transparency throughout everything we are trying to accomplish.
author: Katie S.
pros: The easy to attach key results help organize what tasks helped complete the goals each week. This is very user friendly to navigate and use. It was easy to put this into a weekly routine.
cons: It'd be nice if the notification that your team submitted a reflection showed a summary of what was written not just what was in their summary. The summary seems like extra work to actually complete vs. if it auto summarized what you did. It would be nice on the home screen to show your teammate's priorities and concerns with an easy way to filter these down if you have a larger team with possible "favorites" that you may work more than others or if they could be filtered by who is assigned specific key results.

review_title: I have actively recommended this to several people
description: It's solving
author: Ethan W.
pros: It does exactly what I think more companies need: creates seamless channels for vertical communication and reporting in a scaleable, repeatable way. This helps to create accountability, as well as helping when it comes to any escalations that need to happen. I love it.
cons: I don't have any serious complaints. The team is really good about updating the software frequently, so usually by the time the absence of a certain feature starts to bug me, they have an update underway that fixes it. I haven't even contacted them about any of my complaints because by the time my weekly update was due the week after I noticed something missing, they had added it. This has happened multiple times now.

review_title: A very good software, indeed
description: Everyone in our org. uses Koan to keep track of their high-level work on a weekly basis, inform other members of the org. and update everyone regarding OKR/work progress.
author: Vanessa P.
pros: I like that it's easy to use and it instantly lets your team know about all of your wins for the week. Great way to align an org. that's working in silos.
cons: I think it's missing some features that would really make this a premium software. Would like this to combine OKR/goal management with a project management tool for daily tasks. I wish I didn't have to use multiple tools for this...

review_title: Review of Koan
description: It's been amazing.
author: Tabot A.
pros: From the hook framework paradigm, I love the fact that there are external triggers that get one to come back into the app. Like the reminders about submitting weekly reflections and also encouraging one to check out the reflections of their fellow teammates. That's a very good thing because most of us on the team do forget to submit the weekly reflections on time and without the reminders, there is a tendency for us to lose traction over time. So I really like the reminders. I also love the interface.
cons: I haven't found any for now. When I do I will make sure that I share in like manner as I have done for this.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Transparency and Efficicency
description: My overall experience with Koan is positive.
author: Jean C.
pros: I'm able to understand how the business is doing at my own discretion. I don't have to wait for team meetings or quarterly All-Hands. I can see how the company is tracking toward our goals at any given time, and read what the leaders' thoughts are about hitting goals. If I have questions about performance, I can go straight to the leader and ask them a question. I value the transparency and efficiency this tool brings to our company. Furthermore, it is a reflection that our executives TRUST all employees with this information.
cons: Actually getting to and inputting reflections can be clunky.

review_title: Keep Simple, Keep Clear
description: With few inputs every week you get huge value along time. Why HUGE? - everyone knows clearly company/project goals - everyone can comment and give feedback about how the goal is being carried on. - since day 1 you know how realistic goals are
author: Francisco V.
pros: The software is very clear to use, with few clicks you get the company aligned. Company communication is always a pain point. Company goals are the most important communication to be clear. Koan clarify and organizes company goals from leader to any employee.
cons: You don't see immediate feedback about the comments added in a goal.

review_title: Great for keeping the team on track and focused
description: Overall the experience with Koan is very positive. We are able to state clearly what our intentions are for short term and long term quarter goals, as well as determining the process in regards to the goals.
author: Sheng P.
pros: There is a slack integration that allows for daily checkin's simplifying the checkin process. On Koan there are simple to use metrics which allows our team to determine the progress and and comparison to end goal
cons: Currently the daily checkin does not have the ability to adjust after checking in
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great Product!
author: Blake L.
pros: We use the tool to track our quarterly goals and submit weekly reflections. I like it because we use it in a project management sense to assign owners of objectives and key results. We also submit weekly reflections across our teams and the company to ensure success. The product is VERY ease to use and it has a nice user experience and interface.
cons: Honestly, I don't have any complaints. The software works perfectly for me.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: We don't just recommend it, we use it ourselves
description: Great system, great value and a great team supporting it
author: Roger L.
pros: Love how it's designed around the check-in conversation. That's THE most important activity in OKRs and Koan really encourages them to both happen and be of great quality given the questions it prompts you to reflect on.
cons: Looking forward to visual alignment and being able to set up "periods"

review_title: Excellent tool for communication on projects and goals
description: We wanted a tool that would help get everyone in the company aligned, and surface issues earlier and more transparently. This has been a perfect solution for us.
author: Jade R.
pros: I love the ability to sense what everyone is thinking about our goals and projects, and the fact that the tool doesn't feel bureaucratic or corporate.
cons: There are sometimes little glitches or errors that undermine confidence in the product.

review_title: Love the Help
author: Marie Q.
pros: I really like the solution you use for Help.
cons: I initially found it difficult to navigate easily when adding OKRs

review_title: Great for sharing stories broadly!
description: Great! It's helped our team get better visibility from senior leadership internally and allowed me to read impactful stories myself across the team as well. Such a great thing to see my teammates/my stories shared broadly across our organization!
author: Scott W.
pros: My team uses Koan to share customer stories internally. It's been invaluable with standardizing the sharing process for us and getting stories circulated amongst senior leadership more easily. The integration with Slack is great as well for reminding us to submit our stories.
cons: I have just used it for the one us case of sharing customer stories, but it can be a little tough to navigate at first. Easy once you've used it a few times, though.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
